terms.definition: A precise list of instructions written for a computer to follow, step by step.
Human-readable text that describes a program. In Go, files end in .go.
A named place in memory that holds a value you can read or change later.
What kind of value something is — e.g. string for text, int for whole numbers.
A named block of instructions. func main() is where a runnable program starts.
Runs one branch of code only when a condition is true; otherwise skips or runs else.
